text_zh: reli[注：该词通常为宗教religion的缩写或拼写错误，若为特定品牌或术语则保持原样]
reply_original: Hi! We are so glad you find Fantasia reliable! Your support is the fuel that keeps our team going and inspires us to improve every day. It is truly an honor to be part of your journey. We will keep working hard to create even more magical memories for you! If you ever need help, feel free to reach out at support@fantachat.ai. Enjoy!
reply_zh: 嗨！我们很高兴您觉得 Fantasia 值得信赖！您的支持是驱动我们团队前进的动力，也激励着我们每天不断进步。能成为您旅程中的一部分，我们深感荣幸。我们将继续努力，为您创造更多奇妙的回忆！如果您需要任何帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝您使用愉快！
